cost_assumptions.model: No execution-cost estimate is produced by this proof.
cost_assumptions.scope: Research-only loop run; no tradability or profitability claim.

data_assumptions.coverage: ES_2020_120m path net-excursion slice; high-range-contraction context is pre-registered at the range-contraction factor marginal p75-band (>= 0.328), frozen before any outcome readout.
data_assumptions.source: Already-materialized local FUTSUB feature and label packs are read load-only when present.

exclusion_rules: Do not spend a probe shot unless the pre-test gate passes.
Do not reinterpret rows when feature or label pack resolution reports DATA_GAP.
Do not treat an exploratory readout as promotion evidence.
Do not change the context threshold, the regime state definition, or the target/stop geometry after any outcome readout.
expected_failure_modes: Feature packs are partitioned at ES_2020_full_year while path labels are partitioned at ES_2020_120m.
Local ALPHA_DATA_ROOT or optional parquet support may be unavailable.
The fast readout may remain DATA_GAP / INCONCLUSIVE / REJECT under governed routing; the conditioned positive rate may be low (likely underpowered).
promotion_criteria: No promotion is authorized for this exploratory proof.
Any future WATCH or CANDIDATE would require reviewer-gated evidence outside this run.

timestamp_assumptions.availability: Feature available_ts must be no later than the decision timestamp and before label availability.
timestamp_assumptions.timezone: Materialized row timestamps retain explicit UTC timestamps.

hypothesis_card.author: CONDITIONAL_SETUP_REGIME_PIVOT/smallest-proof
hypothesis_card.expected_mechanism: The context marks the high-range-contraction regime state (normalized regime descriptor at or above a pre-registered factor-marginal threshold), and the trigger marks a distinct sweep-beyond-prior-high-then-reclaim event; the conditional readout asks whether the signed net-excursion path outcome differs inside the elevated-vol-regime context bucket. Any interpretation stays blocked until the pre-test gate and governed surrogate-FDR readout allow it.
falsification_criteria: Block the idea if the bounded slice cannot resolve already-materialized feature and label packs.
Fail the idea if the net-excursion path outcome cannot be derived from both materialized mfe and mae packs.
Reject interpretation if duplicate exposure or surrogate-FDR gates block the exploratory readout.
hypothesis_card.rationale: A pre-declared high-range-contraction volatility-regime CONTEXT STATE (a categorical regime descriptor, NOT a continuous main-effect IC factor) can be read separately from a distinct high-sweep-and-reclaim event, on an existing ES 2020 120m path-label slice. Conditional/state-dependent structure is a higher-prior hypothesis class than unconditional per-instrument price-action factors, which are a confirmed null in this substrate.
risks: The local executor may lack the materialized packs needed for a real readout.
The elevated-vol-regime context and high-sweep trigger may overlap with adjacent volatility-structure variants.
Any exploratory readout remains value-free and promotion-ineligible.
hypothesis_card.title: high-range-contraction vol-regime context x sweep-high trigger -> SIGNED net excursion (MFE+MAE) directional-edge test

mechanism_card.expected_direction: signed net-excursion path outcome after the high-sweep-and-reclaim event inside the high-range-contraction regime state
mechanism_card.expected_mechanism: The context factor reads the normalized high-range-contraction regime descriptor and marks when the high-range-contraction state is active. The trigger factor reads a distinct high-sweep event, and only fires inside the elevated-vol-regime context bucket.
mechanism_card.rationale: A pre-declared high-range-contraction volatility-regime context state can isolate sessions where a separate sweep-beyond-prior-high-then-reclaim event is read against a fixed 120m net-excursion path outcome.

forbidden_post_hoc_changes: No context bucket changes after outcome readout.
No context threshold changes after outcome readout.
No trigger threshold changes after outcome readout.
No target or stop geometry changes after readout.
